actors.name: lag-pr-landing
actors.description: Lands PRs from review feedback. Opens branches, commits fixups, replies to review threads, re-requests review when CI is clean.

actors.name: lag-cto
actors.description: CTO actor's GitHub identity. Opens PRs for plans that need code, authors CodeRabbit replies as CTO. Cannot merge (pol-cto-no-merge keeps merge authority with operator).

actors.name: lag-ceo
actors.description: Operator's human-proxy GitHub identity. Opens PRs, posts operator-initiated PR comments and review replies, and merges PRs when the operator delegates. NOT a decision-bearing authority (that role is lag-cto); lag-ceo's job is attribution only, so artifacts the operator ships through an agent do not carry the operator's personal login. Authority chain: operator (root) -> claude-agent -> lag-ceo[bot]. Rotation and install-scope are operator-controlled via GitHub App settings.
